strategies.entry_rule: If the signal is true after close, enter at the next session open.
strategies.exit_rule: If the signal is false after close, exit at the next session open.
strategies.exposure_rule: Exposure is 1 when QQQ close is above its 20-day simple moving average; otherwise 0.

signals.name: QQQ SMA20
signals.rule: QQQ close > QQQ 20-day simple moving average

strategies.entry_rule: If momentum is positive after close, enter at the next session open.
strategies.exit_rule: If momentum is not positive after close, exit at the next session open.
strategies.exposure_rule: Exposure is 1 when QQQ 60-day return is positive; otherwise 0.
